title: Server Info Command
body:
#
Server Info Command
# Commands - `/server`, `/server info` - show server info - `/server tps` - get current server TPS - `/server plugins` - get server plugins list # Example ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tmquan2508/server-info-command-rewritten/refs/heads/main/example/info.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tmquan2508/server-info-command-rewritten/refs/heads/main/example/plugins.png) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tmquan2508/server-info-command-rewritten/refs/heads/main/example/tps.png)
